label: Riftwarden Apartment
description: Riftwarden Apartment is a compact habitable suite set within Cyrenth Bastion-City’s ferrocrete superstructure, its walls ribbed with void-black reinforcement struts and marked by sealed service conduits. The interior is organized around a narrow central passage that terminates in a pressure-rated living chamber, with a recessed alcove for ration storage and a latrine screened by corrugated partitioning. Lumen strips sit behind armored diffusers, casting a cold, regulated light that remains constant against the bruise-hued auroral dimness outside. A fixed vox-grille and quarantine placard panel dominate the entry bulkhead, reflecting the enclave’s doctrine of siege endurance and contamination control.
